FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.status ORDER BY c.group_id,s.status
"""),indent=2))
print('lead pipeline by created week/group')
print(json.dumps(q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, ((c.created_day)/7)*7 created_week, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, MIN(c.created_day) min_day, MAX(c.created_day) max_day
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
GROUP BY c.group_id, created_week ORDER BY created_week,c.group_id
"""),indent=2))
print('lost/sub/cancel by created week/group')
print(json.dumps(q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.status, ((c.created_day)/7)*7 created_week, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status<>'lead'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.status,created_week ORDER BY created_week,c.group_id,s.status
"""),indent=2))
# latest agent offer age for live leads; use a restricted join on live lead customer ids for speed
print('live lead latest thread by group/sender/age')
print(json.dumps(q(f"""
WITH live AS (
  SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.seat_count,c.created_day FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
), last AS (
  SELECT et.customer_id, MAX(et.message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN live USING(customer_id) WHERE et.closed=0 GROUP BY et.customer_id
), msg AS (
  SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN last ON et.message_id=last.mid
)
SELECT live.group_id,msg.sender,msg.thread_type, msg.turn_number, COUNT(*) n, SUM(live.seat_count) seats,
       MIN({cur}-msg.day) min_age, MAX({cur}-msg.day) max_age, ROUND(AVG({cur}-msg.day),1) avg_age,
       SUM(CASE WHEN msg.sender<>'agent' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) awaiting_us
FROM live JOIN msg USING(customer_id)
GROUP BY live.group_id,msg.sender,msg.thread_type,msg.turn_number
ORDER BY live.group_id,msg.sender,msg.turn_number
"""),indent=2))
print('latest agent offers sample/prices')
print(json.dumps(q(f"""
WITH live AS (
  SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.seat_count,c.created_day FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
), last_agent AS (
  SELECT et.customer_id, MAX(et.message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN live USING(customer_id) WHERE et.sender='agent' GROUP BY et.customer_id
), msg AS (
  SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN last_agent ON et.message_id=last_agent.mid
)
SELECT live.group_id,msg.day,COUNT(*) n,SUM(live.seat_count) seats,substr(msg.offer_json,1,120) offer_json
FROM live JOIN msg USING(customer_id)
GROUP BY live.group_id,msg.day,msg.offer_json
ORDER BY msg.day,live.group_id LIMIT 200
"""),indent=2))

rows = nm.query('''
WITH live AS (
  SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.seat_count,c.created_day FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
), last AS (
  SELECT et.customer_id, MAX(et.message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN live USING(customer_id) WHERE et.closed=0 GROUP BY et.customer_id
), msg AS (
  SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN last ON et.message_id=last.mid
)
SELECT msg.message_id,msg.customer_id,msg.day,msg.sender,msg.thread_type,msg.turn_number,live.group_id,COALESCE(live.seat_count,msg.seat_count) seats
FROM msg JOIN live USING(customer_id)
WHERE msg.sender <> 'agent'
ORDER BY msg.day,msg.message_id
''')['rows']
summary = collections.defaultdict(lambda: [0,0])
deals=[]

    if gid in offers_by_group:
        summary[gid][0] += 1
        summary[gid][1] += int(r.get('seats') or 0)
        deals.append([int(r['customer_id']), offers_by_group[gid]])
print('enterprise awaiting', len(rows), 'deals', len(deals), 'summary', {k:{'n':v[0],'seats':v[1]} for k,v in sorted(summary.items())})
failures=[]
for i in range(0, len(deals), 200):
    chunk=deals[i:i+200]
    res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=chunk)
    for rr in res.get('results', []):
        if not rr.get('success', False):
            failures.append(rr)
    print('enterprise chunk', i//200+1, 'size', len(chunk), 'failures_so_far', len(failures))
print('enterprise failures sample', failures[:10])

WITH live AS (
  SELECT s.customer_id,c.group_id,s.seat_count FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
  WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
), last AS (
  SELECT et.customer_id, MAX(et.message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN live USING(customer_id) WHERE et.closed=0 GROUP BY et.customer_id

SELECT msg.sender,live.group_id,COUNT(*) n,SUM(live.seat_count) seats,MIN(msg.day) min_day,MAX(msg.day) max_day

GROUP BY msg.sender,live.group_id
ORDER BY live.group_id,msg.sender
''')['rows']
